prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic action portrait of a determined man standing on active railway tracks while dramatically stopping a massive freight locomotive with one arm. The man wears a brown tweed blazer over a partially opened white dress shirt revealing a blue-and-red superhero emblem underneath, dark blue jeans, brown leather boots, and black rectangular glasses. His loosened striped necktie flies in the wind as he braces himself against the force of the speeding train.

A weathered red-and-white diesel locomotive dominates the frame, its metal body covered with dirt, rust, scratches, and industrial details. Rocks, dust, and debris explode outward from the tracks as the train grinds to a halt. The scene is captured from a low-angle perspective, emphasizing power, scale, and heroic intensity.

Above, a dramatic sky is filled with towering volumetric clouds illuminated by bright midday sunlight, creating strong god rays, high contrast, and epic cinematic lighting. Rolling green hills stretch into the background. Hyper-detailed textures, realistic motion blur, dynamic action composition, shallow depth of field, HDR photography, ultra-sharp focus, photorealistic skin, blockbuster movie poster style, 8K resolution, masterpiece quality, Unreal Engine realism, dramatic storytelling, award-winning action photography.
